title: lycopodium scariosum var. gayanum
intro: Lycopodium scariosum var. gayanum, also known as Gayan's Club Moss, is a type of plant belonging to the lycopodiopsida class of vascular plants, characterized by its small, scale-like leaves and club-shaped sporophylls. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lycopodium scariosum var. gayanum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
